input: Set up program governance for the Acme Banking Modernization discovery
expected_behavior: Produces S1 Program Charter with phase dependency map, governance model (decision rights matrix), communication plan, and Gantt chart (Mermaid) showing full program timeline with gate milestones.

input: Evaluate Gate G1 after scenario phase completion
expected_behavior: Applies Gate Evaluation Protocol: entry criteria checklist, deliverables check, evidence chain, dependencies resolved, risks carried forward, and verdict (PASS/CONDITIONAL PASS/FAIL) with conditions if applicable.

input: Validate the proposal before sending to the client
expected_behavior: Executes S5 Proposal QA across 4 dimensions: coherencia tecnica, completitud, viabilidad, alineacion. Produces scorecard with composite score, traces failures to source phases, and renders verdict (threshold 3.5/5.0).

input: Map cross-phase dependencies for the discovery pipeline
expected_behavior: Produces S4 dependency matrix showing source phase outputs, consumer phases, data contracts, and status. Includes scope change log and dependency blockers. Mermaid sequence diagram of inter-phase data flow.

input: Generate the program status dashboard with RAG indicators
expected_behavior: Produces S6 dashboard with RAG status per phase, milestone tracking (planned vs actual), risk burn-down, decision log, and variance analysis. Timeline/Gantt shows current state.
